name: Click in Place 20.7qt Clear Open Front Plastic Storage Bin for Home and Office Organization White Latch - Brightroom™
description:
Declutter your home space in sleek style with this 20.7-Quart Open Front Bin from Brightroom™. This storage bin features a spacious silhouette for storing anything from toys to books and beyond. The open front allows easy access to the contents, while the clear construction allows easy identification of the contents from the outside. Plus, the two side integrated handles make carrying it a breeze.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
